actions.value:
To buy cryptocurrencies, simply go into your Edge account and select Buy from the bottom menu bar. 

Set the location to the country where you are located, and you will find a list of services that are supported in your region.


Check through them and pick the best option for you. Each one has different fees, payment methods, and currencies supported. 


Let me know if you have any questions!
